{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Bellowing Horror appearance
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Bellowing Horror]] is about a foot tall, stubby, has greenish-black skin, tiny bat-like wings, black eyes, and a mouth hidden by wormlike tendrils.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
